← Back to app / رجوع للتطبيق

Tactic Boss AI Privacy Policy

Effective date: 5 June 2026

Tactic Boss AI provides football-video-game tactical planning, interactive boards, saved tactics, and rival scouting. This policy explains the information used to provide those features.

Data we process

Account information such as email address and display name; saved tactics, tactical-board positions and drawings, rival profiles, preferences, subscription status, and usage records needed to enforce plan limits and improve reliability. Uploaded screenshots are previewed on your device; the launch client stores only the derived tactical report and image filename, not the screenshot preview itself.

Why we process it

To authenticate your account, synchronize your data, generate and save tactical plans, restore preferences, enforce usage limits, prevent abuse, and support account-deletion requests.

Service providers

The app may use Supabase for authentication and cloud database services, Netlify for web hosting, and Google authentication only when that sign-in option is enabled. These providers process data under their own terms and security practices.

Community content

When you publish a tactic to Community Lite, your chosen coach display name, tactic title, description, game, formation, playstyle, and lightweight tactic data become visible to signed-in users. Community posts do not include uploaded screenshots or tactical-board drawings. You can report inappropriate content, and published content may be hidden for safety or policy reasons.

Sharing and sales

We do not sell personal information. Data is shared only with service providers required to operate the app, or when legally required.

Retention and deletion

Your account data is retained while your account is active and for the time needed to process legitimate operational or legal requirements. You may initiate deletion inside the app or through the account-deletion page. A deletion request covers the account and associated saved app data, subject to any data that must be retained by law.

Security

User-owned database records are protected using authenticated access and row-level security. No service-role key is stored in the app.

Children

The app is not designed to knowingly collect personal data from children below the applicable age of digital consent. The service is intended for users who meet the applicable age of digital consent in their country.

Privacy contact

Use the account-deletion and privacy request page or the privacy request method provided on that page.

سياسة الخصوصية — Tactic Boss AI

تاريخ السريان: 5 يونيو 2026

يعالج التطبيق بيانات الحساب مثل البريد الإلكتروني واسم العرض، والخطط المحفوظة، ورسومات السبورة، وملفات الخصوم، والتفضيلات، وحالة الاشتراك، وسجلات الاستخدام اللازمة لتشغيل الخدمة وحدود الباقات. تتم معاينة الصور المرفوعة على جهازك، وتحفظ نسخة الإطلاق التقرير التكتيكي الناتج واسم الملف فقط، وليس معاينة الصورة نفسها.

عند نشر خطة في مجتمع الخطط، يظهر اسم المدرب الذي اخترته وعنوان الخطة ووصفها واللعبة والتشكيل وأسلوب اللعب وبيانات الخطة الخفيفة للمستخدمين المسجلين. لا تتضمن منشورات المجتمع الصور المرفوعة أو رسومات السبورة. يمكنك الإبلاغ عن المحتوى غير المناسب.

لا نبيع بياناتك الشخصية. تُستخدم البيانات لتسجيل الدخول والمزامنة وحفظ الخطط وتشغيل المزايا وحماية الخدمة. يمكنك طلب حذف الحساب وبياناته من داخل التطبيق أو من صفحة حذف الحساب.
